nasb.text: When Saul and all Israel heard these words of the Philistine, they were dismayed and greatly afraid.

esv.text: When Saul and all Israel heard these words of the Philistine, they were dismayed and greatly afraid.

cnv.text: 掃羅和以色列眾人聽見了那非利士人所說的這些話，就都驚惶，非常害怕。

ccb.text: 扫罗和所有以色列人听了非利士人的这些话，都吓得惊恐不已。
